testcase.name: test_admin_can_create_sku
testcase.failure: tests/test_rbac_system.py:131: in test_admin_can_create_sku assert response.status_code == 200, f"Admin should be able to create SKU: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Admin should be able to create SKU: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","bidso_sku"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"sku_id":"TEST_RBAC_SKU_f4a0d4d2","description":"RBAC Test SKU","vertical":"Test","model":"Test Model","brand":"Test Brand"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","buyer_sku_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"sku_id":"TEST_RBAC_SKU_f4a0d4d2","description":"RBAC Test SKU","vertical":"Test","model":"Test Model","brand":"Test Brand"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_can_create_vendor

failure.message: AssertionError: Admin should be able to create Vendor: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_rbac_system.py:147: in test_admin_can_create_vendor assert response.status_code == 200, f"Admin should be able to create Vendor: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Admin should be able to create Vendor: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_can_create_raw_material
testcase.failure: tests/test_rbac_system.py:163: in test_admin_can_create_raw_material assert response.status_code == 200, f"Admin should be able to create RM: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Admin should be able to create RM: {"detail":"Invalid category: FABRIC"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_demand_planner_can_create_sku
testcase.failure: tests/test_rbac_system.py:230: in test_demand_planner_can_create_sku assert response.status_code == 200, f"Demand Planner should be able to create SKU: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Demand Planner should be able to create SKU: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","bidso_sku"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"sku_id":"TEST_DP_SKU_07bf2d70","description":"Demand Planner Test SKU","vertical":"Test","model":"Test Model","brand":"Test Brand"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","buyer_sku_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"sku_id":"TEST_DP_SKU_07bf2d70","description":"Demand Planner Test SKU","vertical":"Test","model":"Test Model","brand":"Test Brand"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_demand_planner_cannot_delete_raw_materials
testcase.failure: tests/test_rbac_system.py:248: in test_demand_planner_cannot_delete_raw_materials assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_procurement_can_create_vendor

failure.message: AssertionError: Procurement Officer should be able to create Vendor: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_rbac_system.py:333: in test_procurement_can_create_vendor assert response.status_code == 200, f"Procurement Officer should be able to create Vendor: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Procurement Officer should be able to create Vendor: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_procurement_cannot_delete_skus
testcase.failure: tests/test_rbac_system.py:355: in test_procurement_cannot_delete_skus assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
